title: Stardew Village 2
description: Co-op friendly Stardew Valley themed modpack with some Terraria elements, start your own farm with new crops or go hunt for some challenging bosses.
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/41b5f47c87f2f26848886dbca4f9a3b2b494b10f_0.webp)
Step into a **<font color="ForestGreen"> Stardew Valley-inspired** </font> world where you can **<font color="ForestGreen"> grow crops** </font>, raise over 30 different **<font color="OrangeRed"> Animals** </font>, make friends with villagers, and build your own town.

If you prefer **<font color="Crimson"> adventure** </font>, explore **<font color="Crimson"> Terraria-like** </font> lands filled with **<font color="Crimson"> new enemies** </font>, **unique biomes**, and **<font color="Crimson"> tough bosses**</font>, while collecting a **<font color="Gold"> special ingame currency** </font>.

**<font color="ForestGreen"> Plant** </font> and **<font color="ForestGreen"> harvest new crops** </font> as the **<font color="LightSalmon"> seasons** </font> change, and manage your **<font color="Cyan">temperature** </font> to stay warm in winter.

Enjoy **better graphics** with **improved** water, screen effects, and particles.
**Invite friends to join your world** and chat with them using **built-in voice chat**. Experience **realistic sounds** in different environments.

[→All current mods←](https://modrinth.com/modpack/stardew-village-2/version/2.3.1.2)


## Core-Features:
- **New Crops** - plant and harvest a variety of new crops to enhance your farming experience.
- **4 Seasons** - experience changing biome temperatures with each season.
- **Body Temperature** - keep track of your temperature and stay warm during the winter months.
- **New Animals & Monster** - encounter a diverse range of new animals & new monster in the wild.
- **Bosses** - new challenging bosses that whoop your blocky a*s
- **Visual Enhancements** - enjoy improved water, screen, and particle effects.
- **Host Worlds** - invite friends and open your world to them to play together.
- **Voice Chat** - communicate with other players in the game.
- **Audio Enhancements** - experience ambient sounds in biomes, reverb, and echoes in large spaces.
- **Trade** - set up shops and trade with villagers or other players.
- **Build** - create amazing structures with a wide variety of new building blocks.
- **Structures** - discover numerous structures spread throughout the world.
- **Realistic Biomes** - explore biomes that are more true to life, offering a more immersive environment.


##


![Sakura](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nCqErZJZ/images/3a380895b0029ebaa81412ac89b264445f3b1634.png)
##

![Animals](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/nCqErZJZ/images/22440e9f1b24184bd89470086ec1cb1478284888.png)
> *Over 30 new animals + lost vanilla mobs from mojang!*
> *This modpack is getting frequently patchnotes to improve the game experience.*
> Download now and start your adventure!

#
走进一个以星露谷为灵感的世界，在这里你可以种植庄稼，饲养 30 多种不同的动物，与村民交朋友，并建立自己的城镇。

如果你喜欢冒险，可以探索类似 Terraria 的土地，那里充满了新的敌人、独特的生物群系和强大的 Boss，同时收集特殊的游戏货币。

随着季节的变化种植和收获新作物，并管理你的温度以在冬天保持温暖。

享受更好的图形，包括改进的水、屏幕效果和粒子。邀请朋友加入你的世界，并使用内置语音聊天与他们聊天。在不同环境中体验逼真的声音。

→所有当前模组←

核心功能：
新作物 - 种植和收获各种新作物以增强你的农业体验。

4 季 - 体验每个季节生物群系温度的变化。

体温 - 跟踪你的体温并在冬季保持温暖。

新动物和怪物 - 在野外遇到各种各样的新动物和新怪物。
Boss——新的具有挑战性的 Boss，会痛扁你那块积木般的屁股
视觉增强——享受改进的水、屏幕和粒子效果。
主机世界——邀请朋友并向他们开放你的世界，一起玩。
语音聊天——与游戏中的其他玩家交流。
音频增强——体验生物群系中的环境声音、混响和大空间中的回声。
贸易——开设商店并与村民或其他玩家进行贸易。
建造——使用各种新积木建造令人惊叹的建筑。
建筑——发现遍布世界各地的众多建筑。
逼真的生物群系——探索更真实的生物群系，提供更身临其境的环境。
